name: feature-pipeline
description: Implement a full feature across all layers: schema → API → UI → tests → docs (with optional orchestrator synthesis)

synthesizer.prompt: Synthesize the test results and documentation into a feature completion report. Verify test coverage meets requirements. Flag any gaps between implementation and documentation.

steps.prompt: Design the database schema and migration for the new feature. Output migration SQL and entity definitions.
Using the schema designed in the previous step, implement the API endpoints (controller, service, repository layers) with validation.
Build the UI components for the new feature. Cover all states: loading, empty, error, success.
Write unit and integration tests for the backend API and frontend components created in previous steps.
Document the new feature: update API docs, add changelog entry, write migration guide if needed.
